Automation Hub

network_check
System Status NOMINAL

account_tree Logic Directives

search
ID: RUL-092A HVAC Load Shedding
IF Load > 90% AND Time = PEAK THEN Shutdown HVAC Z1, Z2
ID: RUL-104B Emergency Grid Sync
IF Battery < 20% OR Grid Freq < 49.5Hz THEN Initiate Grid Sync
ID: RUL-011C Cooling Override
IF Temp > 45°C THEN Max Cooling Pumps

terminal Live Execution Logs
